# Twitter/X Launch Thread

## Tweet 1 (Hook)
🚨 AI models are being deployed faster than compliance teams can audit them.

The EU AI Act is law. GDPR fines hit €2B+ in 2024. India's DPDP Act is being enforced.

We built the first open-source MCP server that audits AI models against 5 regulatory frameworks in real-time.

Meet ComplianceStack 🧵👇

## Tweet 2 (Problem)
The problem:

❌ Traditional GRC tools are slow, cloud-dependent, and require separate API integrations
❌ Most AI teams don't know if their models are compliant until it's too late
❌ Manual audits take weeks and cost thousands

AI governance shouldn't be an afterthought.

## Tweet 3 (Solution)
ComplianceStack is a 17-phase audit pipeline that plugs directly into your AI assistant.

Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf via Model Context Protocol (MCP).

Every audit runs 100% on-premise. Zero data leaves your infrastructure.

## Tweet 4 (Features)
What it audits:

✅ EU AI Act risk classification (Prohibited → Minimal)
✅ Supply chain provenance (Neo4j graph)
✅ Human oversight verification (BLOCKER FAIL if missing)
✅ Bias assessment (Fairlearn metrics)
✅ GDPR DPIA generation
✅ Adversarial robustness testing
✅ W3C Verifiable Credentials

## Tweet 5 (Tech Stack)
Built for enterprise:

🔒 OAuth 2.1 + RBAC
📊 Merkle audit trails
🔐 Ed25519 cryptographic signing
🛡️ PII redaction middleware
🐳 Docker deployment
⚡ Real-time feedback in your IDE

## Tweet 6 (Comparison)
ComplianceStack vs Traditional GRC Tools:

| Feature | ComplianceStack | Traditional |
|---------|----------------|-------------|
| MCP Integration | Native | Separate API |
| Zero Data Egress | ✅ | ❌ |
| Real-time | ✅ | Batch |
| 17-Phase Pipeline | ✅ | 3-5 checks |
| W3C VCs | ✅ | PDF reports |
| Open Source | ✅ | Proprietary |

## Tweet 7 (Call to Action)
Try it now:

1️⃣ Clone the repo
2️⃣ docker compose up --build -d
3️⃣ Connect Claude Desktop
4️⃣ Ask: "Run a full audit on my model"

GitHub: github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack
